---
title: SingleR annotation of tumour cells
date: 2023-05-18
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

To annotate MB tumour cells using Hendrikse annotations as a reference by running SingleR.


## Files and directories

### Code

See `<tumour Vladoiu software directory>/annot_cluster_singleR.R`.

### Output

Output directory is at `<tumour Vladoiu results directory>/20230518`. The following bash command was run to generate the output:

```bash
$ Rscript /CBL_scRNAseq/software/tumour/Vladoiu/annot_cluster_singleR.R \
      --srat_rds /CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/Vladoiu/20230510/mb_mnn.rds \
      --ref_rds /isilon/CBL_scRNAseq-archived/data/human/Aldinger/glutamatergic_dev_Liam.RDS \
      --out_dir ./ \
      &> annot_cluster_singleR.log
```


## Results

![UMAP of tumour cells.](/CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/Vladoiu/20230518/umaps.png){#fig-umap}

![Bar charts showing distribution of cells.](/CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/Vladoiu/20230518/annot_bar.png){#fig-bar-proportions}

@fig-umap shows the UMAP of the tumour cells coloured by sample, subtype, and SingleR annotation. @fig-bar-proportions show the proportion of cell type predictions in each subtype/sample/cluster. The SingleR annotations are as expected (Group 4 to Early UBCs, Group 3 to RL<sub>SVZ</sub>/Early UBCs, SHH to GCPs).


![SingleR score of each annotated tumour cell.](/CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/Vladoiu/20230518/score_heatmap.png){#fig-pred-score}

For @fig-pred-score, each column represents a tumour cell and the colour indicates the score for each of the annotations (higher is better). The final annotation of the cell is shown in "Labels".

Next step is to run everything using the full Aldinger dataset as a reference since the tumour microglia clusters are not being annotated as such. Also need to perform hierarchical clustering on the columns and add an `annotation_col` for the subtypes.
